title: Coverage floors baselined at 90/92 for check:all adoption
rationale: Floors must be measured WITH the L5-toolkit scripts in the test run: adding scripts/check-*.ts suites shifted All-files coverage from 91.40/93.45 to 91.05/92.84 (fn/lines), so floors were set at 90.0/92.0 with ~1pp cushion (seeds-style) to absorb measurement noise.

name: biome-formatter-override-for-frozen-scripts
description: Byte-frozen check-all.ts/check-ci-parity.ts vs biome: burrow's lint:fix reformatted the frozen runners (template formatting differs from repo biome config). Repo-side fix is a biome.json override disabling the formatter for scripts/check-all.ts and scripts/check-ci-parity.ts (same as seeds); never edit the scripts. Verify with cmp against templates/l5-toolkit after any lint:fix.
